the_impact_set: The first millisecond, the birth of the light / Breaking the silence, ending the night
A needle of sound, a razor of code / Driving the energy down the road
Surgical strike, the transient's here / Erasing the distance, erasing the fear
the_click_set: Click of the logic, click of the soul / Taking the moment, taking control
Fast as the thought, sharp as the steel / Making the digital finally real
Attack is the truth, sustain is the lie / The spark of the binary, ready to fly
the_transient_dialogue: Strike the void / Wake the machine
What you destroyed / Is what I have seen

psychoacoustic_transient_v4.the_blink_effect: Instant 15ms high-pass sweep (20Hz to 1kHz) on the master bus during the kick-hit
psychoacoustic_transient_v4.transient_widening: Stereo-expansion +45% during the first 10ms of the snare impact
psychoacoustic_transient_v4.masking_prevention: Ducking the high-hats by 12dB during the snare transient
